courseleaf.title: Plant Pathology, Doctor of Philosophy
courseleaf.informationtext:
Graduate Study

The Department of Plant Pathology offers programs of study and research leading to M.S. and Ph.D. degrees. Information can be obtained from the graduate advisor. For further details, see Graduate Studies.

Degree Requirements & Program Coordinator

See Plant Pathology.
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The UC Davis Plant Pathology graduate program is one of the most highly ranked and respected Plant Pathology graduate programs in the world. The program offers study in plant pathology, including emphasis on diseases caused by viruses, bacteria, fungi, and nematodes. We have excellent placement rates for our graduates in a variety of fields.
